hero_subtitle: SFTY supports government teams in restructuring oversight operations by connecting fragmented data into evidence-ready supervisory workflows for clearer market visibility and decision-making.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervisory control falters with disconnected data
problem_description: Government teams face delays and gaps when supervisory information remains isolated across multiple sources and providers. This fragmentation makes it difficult to coordinate risk assessment, evidence collection and regulatory reporting in a coherent operational workflow.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY unifies fragmented data sources, provider outputs, case workflows, evidence logs and reporting into a single platform that streamlines government supervisory operations for digital asset oversight.
workflow_title: From market signals to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY connects fragmented market data through alert generation, case creation, investigation, and action to produce evidence-based supervisory outcomes and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A supervisory control plane
why_sfty_description: SFTY links fragmented market signals, entity data, cases and evidence into one secure operating layer designed for evidence-based government supervision workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY provides government teams a secure, evidence-grade platform supporting controlled access, auditability and procurement-safe deployment for structured supervisory modernization.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support supervisory workflow restructuring
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how operational workflows connect market signals to cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade logging supports audit-ready supervision
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe secure deployment options for government supervisory teams
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for government regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a secure supervisory layer that connects VASP, CASP data, licensing records, wallets, transactions, KYT, KYC, Travel Rule messages, alerts, cases and reports for government regulators.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support supervisory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures fragmented market signals into alerts, cases, workflows and reporting to help regulators manage investigations, assessments and supervisory actions efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence-grade records to support supervisory actions are traceable and ready for review or audit.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect multiple KYT, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and analytics providers within one supervised operating environment without disrupting current compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured supervisory workflows without replacing the underlying analytics or data sources.
final_title: Structure digital asset supervision workflows clearly
final_description: Review how SFTY supports operational restructuring with connected cases, evidence, supervisory records and audit-ready workflows for regulators.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
